# Port target: `@eslint/json`

| | |
|---|---|
| Upstream repo | https://github.com/eslint/json |
| Submodule | `upstream/eslint-json` @ `json-v2.0.0` |
| Baseline npm version | `2.0.0` |
| License | Apache-2.0 |
| Oxlint native support | none — port target |
| Rules to port | 6 |

> Language plugin: lints JSON/JSONC/JSON5 files. Out of Oxlint's current JS/TS scope; tracked for completeness and a possible future language target.

## Rules

| # | Rule | Description |
|---|------|-------------|
| 1 | `no-duplicate-keys` | Disallow duplicate keys in JSON objects |
| 2 | `no-empty-keys` | Disallow empty keys in JSON objects |
| 3 | `no-unnormalized-keys` | Disallow JSON keys that are not normalized |
| 4 | `no-unsafe-values` | Disallow JSON values that are unsafe for interchange |
| 5 | `sort-keys` | Require JSON object keys to be sorted |
| 6 | `top-level-interop` | Require the JSON top-level value to be an array or object |
